epics.title: Infrastructure & DevOps
epics.description: Project scaffold, Docker, database, authentication and all shared infrastructure

epics.title: cPanel Frontend
epics.description: All cPanel UI pages — sidebar navigation, dashboard, and every feature section

epics.title: cPanel API Backend
epics.description: All Fastify REST + WebSocket API routes powering the cPanel frontend

epics.title: WHM Panel
epics.description: WHM admin UI and API for hosting reseller / server management

sprints.title: Project Foundation
sprints.goal: Monorepo, Docker, database, and auth working end-to-end

tasks.title: Monorepo Setup
tasks.description: pnpm workspaces with packages: api, frontend, whm-ui, shared; TypeScript config

tasks.title: Docker — API Image
tasks.description: Multi-stage Dockerfile.api: build (tsx compile) + runtime (Alpine, native modules)

tasks.title: Docker — nginx Image
tasks.description: Dockerfile.nginx serving cPanel :2083 and WHM :2087 with API proxy

tasks.title: docker-compose Stack
tasks.description: Orchestrates api, nginx, mysql, mailhog, mailserver, roundcube services

tasks.title: MySQL + Knex ORM
tasks.description: DB connection pool, knexfile for dev/prod, migration runner

tasks.title: Initial DB Schema
tasks.description: Migrations for: accounts, plans, servers, domains, email_accounts, ftp, mysql_dbs, dns_records, ssl_certs, cron_jobs

tasks.title: JWT Authentication
tasks.description: bcrypt password hashing, @fastify/jwt token sign/verify, auth preHandler plugin

tasks.title: Dev Token Helper
tasks.description: GET /dev-token returns a signed JWT for the first seeded user — frictionless local dev

tasks.title: Database Seeds
tasks.description: Initial seed: admin account, test user, plans, server record for local dev

sprints.title: Core cPanel Pages
sprints.goal: Login, sidebar navigation, dashboard and account info live

tasks.title: cPanel Login Page
tasks.description: Username/password form, JWT stored in localStorage, redirect to dashboard

tasks.title: Sidebar Navigation
tasks.description: Collapsible sidebar with 7 sections: Email, Files, Databases, Domains, Metrics, Security, Advanced

tasks.title: Dashboard Page
tasks.description: Stat cards (email, DB, FTP, domains), disk usage bar, quick-link grid, server info panel

tasks.title: cPanel Login API
tasks.description: POST /cpanel/login — validates credentials, returns signed JWT

tasks.title: Account Info API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/account/info — returns server IP, last login IP, records login event

tasks.title: Account Plan API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/account/plan — returns plan limits and current usage for the logged-in account

sprints.title: Email Section
sprints.goal: Full email management: accounts, forwarders, routing, autoresponders and all sub-features

tasks.title: Email Features DB Schema
tasks.description: Migrations: email_routing, autoresponders, filters, mailing_lists, subscribers, gpg_keys, spam_config, caldav_config, calendars, contacts

tasks.title: Email Accounts Page
tasks.description: List, create, delete email accounts; shows quota; Webmail button opens RoundCube

tasks.title: Webmail Page
tasks.description: Launch cards per email account; opens RoundCube at :2096 in new tab

tasks.title: Forwarders Page
tasks.description: Add and delete email forwarders with source → destination mapping

tasks.title: Email Routing Page
tasks.description: Set local / remote / backup MX routing mode per domain

tasks.title: Autoresponders Page
tasks.description: Create/delete auto-reply rules with from-name, subject, body, interval

tasks.title: Default Address Page
tasks.description: Configure catch-all action: discard, bounce, or forward to address

tasks.title: Mailing Lists Page
tasks.description: Create/delete lists; manage subscribers with add/remove

tasks.title: Track Delivery Page
tasks.description: Email delivery log showing sent messages, status, and recipient

tasks.title: Global Email Filters Page
tasks.description: Server-wide filter rules with conditions (from/to/subject/body) and actions

tasks.title: Email Account Filters Page
tasks.description: Per-account filter rules; same rule engine as global filters

tasks.title: Email Deliverability Page
tasks.description: SPF, DKIM, DMARC status cards per domain with recommendations

tasks.title: Address Importer Page
tasks.description: Bulk CSV import of email addresses into accounts or forwarders

tasks.title: Spam Filters Page
tasks.description: SpamAssassin required score, auto-delete threshold, whitelist/blacklist

tasks.title: Encryption Page
tasks.description: GPG key generation, list keys, delete keys per email account

tasks.title: BoxTrapper Page
tasks.description: Challenge-response spam filter: enable/disable and configure per account

tasks.title: Calendars Config Page
tasks.description: CalDAV server URL and credential settings

tasks.title: Calendars Sharing Page
tasks.description: Share calendars with other users; read/write permission toggle

tasks.title: Calendars Management Page
tasks.description: Create/edit/delete calendars and contacts (CalDAV + CardDAV)

tasks.title: Email Disk Usage Page
tasks.description: Per-account storage stats showing MB used

tasks.title: Email Accounts API
tasks.description: POST/GET/DELETE /cpanel/mail — CRUD with docker-mailserver sync

tasks.title: Forwarders API
tasks.description: POST/GET/DELETE /cpanel/mail/forwarders

tasks.title: Email Routing API
tasks.description: GET/POST /cpanel/mail/routing

tasks.title: Autoresponders API
tasks.description: GET/POST/DELETE /cpanel/mail/autoresponders

tasks.title: Default Address API
tasks.description: GET/POST /cpanel/email/default-address

tasks.title: Mailing Lists API
tasks.description: Full CRUD for lists and subscribers under /cpanel/email/mailing-lists

tasks.title: Email Filters API
tasks.description: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /cpanel/email/filters — global and per-account scope

tasks.title: Address Importer API
tasks.description: POST /cpanel/email/import — parses CSV, creates accounts/forwarders in bulk

tasks.title: BoxTrapper API
tasks.description: GET/POST /cpanel/email/boxtrapper

tasks.title: GPG Keys API
tasks.description: GET/POST/DELETE /cpanel/email/gpg-keys

tasks.title: Spam Filter API
tasks.description: GET/POST /cpanel/email/spam-config — SpamAssassin settings

tasks.title: Track Delivery API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/email/delivery-log — paginated delivery log

tasks.title: Email Deliverability API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/email/deliverability — SPF/DKIM/DMARC check per domain

tasks.title: Email Disk Usage API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/email/disk-usage — per-account storage totals

tasks.title: CalDAV / Contacts API
tasks.description: Full CRUD for caldav_config, calendars, contacts under /cpanel/caldav

sprints.title: Mail Infrastructure
sprints.goal: Real SMTP sending, MailHog dev catcher, docker-mailserver + RoundCube

tasks.title: MailHog Dev SMTP
tasks.description: MailHog container: SMTP :1025, web UI :8025 — catches all outbound email in dev

tasks.title: docker-mailserver Container
tasks.description: Postfix + Dovecot all-in-one: SMTP :25/:587, IMAP :143/:993

tasks.title: RoundCube Webmail
tasks.description: RoundCube container on :2096, connected to docker-mailserver Dovecot

tasks.title: SMTP Sending API
tasks.description: POST /cpanel/mail/send — nodemailer, supports MailHog dev / SendGrid / SES in prod

tasks.title: SMTP Config + Test API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/mail/smtp-config, POST /cpanel/mail/test-smtp

tasks.title: docker-mailserver Integration Service
tasks.description: mailserver.ts service: addAccount/deleteAccount/updatePassword/syncAccounts via Docker exec (dockerode)

tasks.title: Admin Mail Sync API
tasks.description: POST /admin/mail/sync — syncs all DB email accounts to docker-mailserver

sprints.title: Files & Databases
sprints.goal: File Manager, WordPress Toolkit, MySQL, FTP and Backups complete

tasks.title: File Manager Page
tasks.description: Browse directories, create/edit/delete files and folders, chmod, copy, move, rename, download

tasks.title: WordPress Toolkit Page
tasks.description: Install WordPress into a domain path, list installations, uninstall

tasks.title: Images Page
tasks.description: List images in public_html, resize by pixel width with preview

tasks.title: Disk Usage Page
tasks.description: Storage breakdown by directory with visual usage bar

tasks.title: FTP Accounts Page
tasks.description: Create FTP user with directory and quota, list, delete

tasks.title: Backups Page
tasks.description: Create full backup (tar.gz), list with size/date, download link, delete

tasks.title: MySQL Databases Page
tasks.description: Create/delete databases, create/delete users, assign user privileges to DB

tasks.title: phpMyAdmin Page
tasks.description: Embedded link that opens phpMyAdmin for the account's databases

tasks.title: File Manager API
tasks.description: GET list/read/download; POST create/write/delete/copy/move/chmod/rename; all scoped to account home dir

tasks.title: WordPress Toolkit API
tasks.description: GET installations; POST /wordpress/install (download + configure WP); POST /wordpress/uninstall

tasks.title: WordPress DB Schema
tasks.description: Migration for wordpress_installations table

tasks.title: Images API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/images/list; POST /cpanel/images/resize (Sharp)

tasks.title: Disk Usage API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/metrics/disk-usage — directory tree with sizes

tasks.title: FTP Accounts API
tasks.description: POST/GET/DELETE /cpanel/ftp

tasks.title: Backups API
tasks.description: POST/GET/DELETE /cpanel/backups — tar.gz creation to backups directory

tasks.title: MySQL API
tasks.description: POST/GET/DELETE for databases and users; POST /cpanel/mysql/assign for privileges

sprints.title: Domains, Metrics & Security
sprints.goal: Addon domains, redirects, DNS, SSL, visitors and bandwidth working

tasks.title: Addon Domains Page
tasks.description: Add addon domain with document root, list, delete

tasks.title: Redirects Page
tasks.description: Add 301/302 URL redirects, list active redirects, delete

tasks.title: DNS Zone Editor Page
tasks.description: View all DNS records per domain, add A/CNAME/MX/TXT records, delete

tasks.title: Visitors Page
tasks.description: Raw access log analytics: page views, unique IPs, recent requests

tasks.title: Bandwidth Page
tasks.description: Monthly transfer usage chart per domain

tasks.title: SSL/TLS Page
tasks.description: Install certificate, toggle autorenew, delete SSL per domain

tasks.title: Domains API
tasks.description: POST/GET/DELETE /cpanel/domains; POST/GET/DELETE /cpanel/domains/redirects

tasks.title: DNS Zone API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/dns/:domain; POST add record; DELETE /cpanel/dns/:domain/:recordId

tasks.title: Visitors & Bandwidth API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/metrics/visitors and /cpanel/metrics/bandwidth

tasks.title: SSL/TLS API
tasks.description: POST install, GET list, PUT autorenew toggle, DELETE /cpanel/ssl

sprints.title: Terminal & Cron
sprints.goal: Real PTY-backed SSH terminal and cron job management live

tasks.title: WebSocket Support
tasks.description: @fastify/websocket registered in app; nginx map $http_upgrade for upgrade proxying

tasks.title: node-pty Setup
tasks.description: node-pty native addon; rebuilt for Node.js v25; postinstall rebuild in root package.json

tasks.title: SSH Terminal Page
tasks.description: xterm.js terminal (GitHub dark theme, FitAddon, WebLinksAddon); macOS toolbar; reconnect button

tasks.title: Terminal WebSocket API
tasks.description: GET /cpanel/terminal/ws — JWT via query param, spawns /bin/sh via node-pty, bridges PTY ↔ WebSocket

tasks.title: Cron Jobs Page
tasks.description: Add cron schedule with command and cron expression, list jobs, delete

tasks.title: Cron Jobs API
tasks.description: GET/POST/DELETE /cpanel/cron — stores and manages cron expressions

sprints.title: WHM Panel
sprints.goal: Full WHM admin panel: account management, plans, service monitoring

tasks.title: WHM Login
tasks.description: Admin-only login form; POST /whm/login returns WHM JWT

tasks.title: WHM Dashboard
tasks.description: Overview stats: total accounts, active, suspended, server load

tasks.title: WHM Account Management
tasks.description: List all accounts, create, suspend, unsuspend, terminate, change plan, change password

tasks.title: WHM Account Detail
tasks.description: View individual account details: plan, usage, domain, status

tasks.title: WHM Plans Management
tasks.description: Create/edit/delete hosting plans with resource limits; enable/disable toggle

tasks.title: WHM Service Status
tasks.description: Live health cards for MySQL, API, mail server

tasks.title: WHM Activity Log
tasks.description: Feed of recent account events: created, suspended, plan changed, etc.

tasks.title: WHM JSON API
tasks.description: cPanel-compatible endpoints: createacct, suspendacct, unsuspendacct, terminateacct, accountsummary
